languages.text: "Конечно, Лорд-капитан. Первый план предполагает создание небольшой прорывной группы солдат, несущих многомощную взрывчатку. Их цель — прорваться как можно глубже в руины ксеносов, ближе к их источнику энергии, и взорвать его... вместе с собой".

"Of course, Lord Captain. The first plan involves a small group of soldiers carrying high explosives. Their objective will be to penetrate as deep into the xenos ruins as possible, close to their energy source, and blow it up... along with themselves."
languages.original_text: "Конечно, Лорд-капитан. Первый план предполагает создание небольшой прорывной группы солдат, несущих многомощную взрывчатку. Их цель — прорваться как можно глубже в руины ксеносов, ближе к их источнику энергии, и взорвать его... вместе с собой".

traits.locale_text: "Of course, Lord Captain. The first plan involves a small group of soldiers carrying high explosives. Their objective will be to penetrate as deep into the xenos ruins as possible, close to their energy source, and blow it up... along with themselves."

"Of course, Lord Captain. The first plan involves a small group of soldiers carrying high explosives. Their objective will be to penetrate as deep into the xenos ruins as possible, close to their energy source, and blow it up... along with themselves."

"Of course, Lord Captain. The first plan involves a small group of soldiers carrying high explosives. Their objective will be to penetrate as deep into the xenos ruins as possible, close to their energy source, and blow it up... along with themselves."

languages.text: 「もちろん、艦長。最初の計画は、少量の高性能爆薬を携えた少数の兵士が、異星人の遺跡のエネルギー源に近いところまで潜り込み、自爆する計画です」
languages.original_text: "Of course, Lord Captain. The first plan involves a small group of soldiers carrying high explosives. Their objective will be to penetrate as deep into the xenos ruins as possible, close to their energy source, and blow it up... along with themselves."

traits.locale_text: 「もちろん、艦長。最初の計画は、少量の高性能爆薬を携えた少数の兵士が、異星人の遺跡のエネルギー源に近いところまで潜り込み、自爆する計画です。」

languages.text: «Por supuesto, Lord Capitán. El primer plan necesita un grupo reducido de soldados con explosivos potentes. Su objetivo será adentrarse tanto como pueda en las ruinas xenos, acercándose a la fuente de energía, y volarla... junto con la propia unidad».
languages.original_text: "Of course, Lord Captain. The first plan involves a small group of soldiers carrying high explosives. Their objective will be to penetrate as deep into the xenos ruins as possible, close to their energy source, and blow it up... along with themselves."

traits.locale_text: «Por supuesto, Lord Capitán. El primer plan necesita un grupo reducido de soldados con explosivos potentes. Su objetivo será adentrarse tanto como pueda en las ruinas xenos, acercándose a la fuente de energía, y volarla... junto con la propia unidad».

languages.text: “遵命，舰长大人。方案一：派小队携高爆炸药渗透至异形遗迹深处，接近其能量源后引爆……与目标同归于尽。”
languages.original_text: "Of course, Lord Captain. The first plan involves a small group of soldiers carrying high explosives. Their objective will be to penetrate as deep into the xenos ruins as possible, close to their energy source, and blow it up... along with themselves."

traits.locale_text: “遵命，舰长大人。方案一：派小队携高爆炸药渗透至异形遗迹深处，接近其能量源后引爆……与目标同归于尽。”

languages.text: "Natürlich, Lord Captain. Der erste Plan basiert auf einer kleinen Gruppe von Soldaten mit Sprengsätzen. Sie sollen so tief wie möglich in die Xenosruinen vordringen, um ihre Energiequelle zu sprengen ... und sich selbst."
languages.original_text: "Of course, Lord Captain. The first plan involves a small group of soldiers carrying high explosives. Their objective will be to penetrate as deep into the xenos ruins as possible, close to their energy source, and blow it up... along with themselves."

traits.locale_text: "Natürlich, Lord Captain. Der erste Plan basiert auf einer kleinen Gruppe von Soldaten mit Sprengsätzen. Sie sollen so tief wie möglich in die Xenosruinen vordringen, um ihre Energiequelle zu sprengen ... und sich selbst."

languages.text: "Elbette Lord Kaptan. İlk plan, yüksek patlayıcılar taşıyan küçük bir grup askeri içeriyor. Hedefleri zeno harabelerinin mümkün olduğunca derinlerine, enerji kaynaklarına yakın bir yere kadar nüfuz etmek ve onu... Kendileriyle birlikte havaya uçurmak olacak."
languages.original_text: "Of course, Lord Captain. The first plan involves a small group of soldiers carrying high explosives. Their objective will be to penetrate as deep into the xenos ruins as possible, close to their energy source, and blow it up... along with themselves."

traits.locale_text: "Elbette Lord Kaptan. İlk plan, yüksek patlayıcılar taşıyan küçük bir grup askeri içeriyor. Hedefleri zeno harabelerinin mümkün olduğunca derinlerine, enerji kaynaklarına yakın bir yere kadar nüfuz etmek ve onu... Kendileriyle birlikte havaya uçurmak olacak."

languages.text: « À votre service, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Le premier plan implique un petit groupe de soldats équipés de puissants explosifs. Leur objectif serait de s'aventurer le plus profondément possible dans les ruines xénos, à proximité de leur source d'énergie, et de la faire exploser... au prix de leurs vies. »
languages.original_text: "Of course, Lord Captain. The first plan involves a small group of soldiers carrying high explosives. Their objective will be to penetrate as deep into the xenos ruins as possible, close to their energy source, and blow it up... along with themselves."

traits.locale_text: « À votre service, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Le premier plan implique un petit groupe de soldats équipés de puissants explosifs. Leur objectif serait de s'aventurer le plus profondément possible dans les ruines xénos, à proximité de leur source d'énergie, et de la faire exploser... au prix de leurs vies. »
